# La Sparkle Aesthetic & Wellness Clinic

> Doctor-led aesthetic, skin, laser and hair-restoration clinic with two locations in Kutch, Gujarat — Bhuj and Gandhidham. Founded by Dr. Nidhi Thacker. Advanced, non-surgical treatments. Rated 4.7★ by 64 patients on Google.

## The Team & Doctors
- Dr. Nidhi Thacker (Founder & Lead Cosmetologist) — Dental Surgeon · Fellowship in Facial Aesthetics · Certified Cosmetologist & Laser Specialist · Trichologist. Specialises in advanced non-surgical facial rejuvenation, medical lasers, energy-based devices, and clinical hair restoration. Verified on Instagram (@dr_nidhi_thacker) with 11.2K+ followers.
- Dr. Shivani Meghani (Cosmetologist & Laser Specialist) — Certified Laser Specialist & Medical Aesthetic Practitioner.
- Dr. Ritu Pitroda (Cosmetologist & Trichologist) — Clinical Hair Restoration Specialist & Aesthetic Consultant.

## Locations
- Bhuj: La Sparkle Clinic, Sanjeevan Eye & Dental Hospital, Nr. Kadva Patidar Samaj, Camp Area Road, Bhuj, Kutch 370001 — Phone: +91 93274 80111
- Gandhidham: 1st Floor, V & M Point, Plot No. 39, Ward 7A, Opp. Ramat Gamat Sankul, Gurukul Road, Gandhidham, Kutch 370201 — Phone: +91 90230 99819

## Contact & Booking
- WhatsApp (booking): +91 93274 80111
- Email: lasparklewellness@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 10:00 AM–2:00 PM and 4:00 PM–8:00 PM. Closed 2–4 PM and on Sundays.
- Areas served: Bhuj, Gandhidham, Adipur, and the wider Kutch region.

## Treatments
- Laser Hair Reduction (painless, all skin tones, face & body)
- Laser Toning (pigmentation, tan, even tone)
- HIFU & Skin Tightening (non-surgical lifting, energy-based)
- MNRF — Microneedling Radiofrequency (texture, pores, scars)
- Anti-Ageing & Facial Rejuvenation (non-surgical)
- Medical-Grade Facials
- Acne & Acne Scar Treatment
- PRP Hair Restoration (trichologist-led)
- Acupuncture (wellness)
- Hijama / Cupping Therapy (wellness)
